suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify validation expectations so `followedProcedure` only remains true when required validators were actually run, or explicitly allow lint omission for no-code-change visual QA runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three reviewed features reported `followedProcedure: true` while not consistently running the lint step required by the skill (chart-price-relocation, navbar-polish, visual-coherence-check).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align typography guidance between mission instructions and skill instructions (especially for prices/amounts vs addresses/hashes) to avoid implementation drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: stats-about-activity-redesign review found guidance conflict: mission AGENTS says monospace only for identifiers, while skill text references mono usage for prices/amounts/IDs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a reliable fallback process for viewport verification when `agent-browser --viewport` cannot exceed xl thresholds in this environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: layout-and-borderless-overhaul review captured environment friction around achieving >1280px viewport validation with agent-browser settings.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update web service healthcheck immediately to fix possible false negatives caused by root-route 404 responses.
Multiple repeated reports that lint was skipped while skill follow-state was marked true.
Multiple repeated reports about potential web healthcheck brittleness.
